reviews.comment:
No se si la chica que atiende tiene problemas auditivos, ya que siempre pido lo mismo tostado y cafe siempre me trae el caffe solo lo termino y pregunto por mi tostado, respondiendo hay nocte escuché 3 veces te lo pedí no puede ser que no escuches... 24de junio 6:40 am.

(Translated by Google)
I don't know if the girl who serves me has hearing problems, because I always order the same thing, toast and coffee. She always brings me the coffee, I just finish it and ask for my toast, and she replies, "Oh no, I heard you three times, I asked you, it can't be that you don't hear me..." June 24th, 6:40 am.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPZ0tiQVhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo tenían abierto el baño de discapacitados. Y había más de tres personas esperando. No es full.

(Translated by Google)
Only the accessible restroom was open. And there were more than three people waiting. It's not full.
